notes: FDC Foundation entry 2646170 (raw, boneless, skinless). Input file reports 165 kcal / 3.6g fat — these match a *cooked* value, not raw. Expect MAJOR_DISCREPANCY on kcal and fat. Sat-fat filled from SR Legacy 171477.

FDC Foundation entry 747447 (broccoli, raw). Input file reports 34 kcal / 2.8g protein / 7.0g carbs — all within ~10 % of USDA values. Expect MINOR_DISCREPANCY (carbs ~12 % high) or MATCH depending on thresholds.
